mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, p.NAME AS projectName,
(t.PROGRESS_PERCENT * t.WEIGHT) AS weightedProgress FROM TF_TASK t JOIN TF_TASK_ASSIGNEE ta ON t.ID = ta.TASK_ID JOIN TF_PROJECT p ON t.PROJECT_ID = p.ID WHERE ta.USER_ID = #{empno} AND ( TRUNC(t.DUE_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) OR TRUNC(t.START_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) OR t.STATUS IN ('TODO','ONGOING') ) ORDER BY t.PRIORITY DESC, t.DUE_DATE ASC
SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(WEIGHT) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(PROGRESS_PERCENT * WEIGHT) / SUM(WEIGHT) END AS PROJECT_PROGRESS FROM TF_TASK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_TASK( ID, PROJECT_ID, PARENT_TASK_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, PRIORITY, START_DATE, DUE_DATE, PROGRESS_PERCENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_TASK_PK.nextval, #{projectId}, #{parentTaskId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{startDate}, #{dueDate}, #{progressPercent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_TASK SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, PARENT_TASK_ID = #{parentTaskId}, NAME = #{name}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, STATUS = #{status}, PRIORITY = #{priority}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, DUE_DATE = #{dueDate}, PROGRESS_PERCENT = #{progressPercent}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TF_TASK SET STATUS = 'DONE', PROGRESS_PERCENT = 100, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{taskId}

UPDATE TF_PROJECT SET PROGRESS = CASE WHEN (SELECT SUM(WEIGHT) FROM TF_TASK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ( SELECT SUM(PROGRESS_PERCENT * WEIGHT) / SUM(WEIGHT) FROM TF_TASK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ) END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{projectId}
